title: Delvin Garvin Hall Vs. Commissioner of Police
text:
1
1 COMMONWEALTH OF THE BAHAMAS
2 IN THE COURT OF APPEAL
3 MCCrApp & CAIS No. 219 of 2024
4
5 Delvin Garvin Hall
6 Intended Appellant
7 vs
8
9 The Commissioner of Police
10 Intended Respondent
11
12 (Extension of Time)
13
Before: The Hon Mr Justice Turner, JA
14 The Hon Mr Justice Hilton, JA
The Hon Mr Justice Kokaram, JA

2
1 The oral judgment of the court was delivered by
2 Turner, JA:
3 The Intended Appellant having completed the serving
4 of his sentence, his application for an extension of time
5 within which to appeal his sentence of four months is
6 dismissed, and the conviction and attendant sentence are
7 affirmed.
8
9
10 Dated this 14th day of April, 2026

summary: The Intended Appellant having completed the serving of his sentence, his application for an extension of time within which to appeal his sentence of four months is dismissed, and the conviction and attendant sentence are affirmed.
